name: Ahmed Whaleed
bio: Computer Engineer (2019) with growing experience in Python development, system administration, and automation. My interests sit at the intersection of backend engineering, Linux systems, and AI-driven technologies. I enjoy building practical projects that solve real problems, from backend APIs to system tools and automation scripts. I am currently developing my skills in machine learning, cloud computing, and MLOps, with a focus on building scalable and efficient systems.

projects.title: Portfolio Website
projects.desc: A personal portfolio built with Flask, featuring a custom cursor, typewriter effect, and a live admin panel for editing content without touching code.

projects.title: Linux Automation Scripts
projects.desc: A collection of Bash and Python scripts that automate system administration tasks — backups, log rotation, process monitoring, and cron management.

projects.title: ML Classifier Pipeline
projects.desc: An end-to-end machine learning pipeline using Scikit-learn and Pandas for data cleaning, feature engineering, model training, and evaluation.
